title: Software Tester (Programmatūras testētājs) in Customer Overview and Digital Enablers Tribe| SEB Riga

summary.lv: SEB Rīga meklē Software Tester Customer Overview un Digital Enablers Tribe — nodrošināt CRM risinājumu kvalitāti ar manuālo un automatizēto testēšanu.
summary.en: SEB Riga is looking for a Software Tester to join the Customer Overview and Digital Enablers Tribe, ensuring quality of CRM solutions through manual and automated testing.
